requirement_topic.en: EMC — ICONTEC NTC Standards (Radiated and Conducted Emissions)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——ICONTEC NTC标准（辐射和传导发射）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——ICONTEC NTC標準（輻射和傳導發射）

summary.en: Colombia follows ICONTEC (Instituto Colombiano de Normas Técnicas y Certificación) NTC standards, which adopt IEC and CISPR international standards for electromagnetic compatibility. Wireless and IoT devices are expected to comply with NTC-adopted equivalents of CISPR 32 (multimedia equipment emissions) and CISPR 35 (multimedia equipment immunity), and where applicable IEC 61000 series EMC standards. EMC compliance evidence is typically required as part of the CRC homologación technical dossier. ICONTEC is the national standards body; SIC administers market-surveillance enforcement.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚遵循ICONTEC（哥伦比亚标准与认证研究所）NTC标准，该标准采用IEC和CISPR国际标准作为电磁兼容性依据。无线及物联网设备须符合NTC采用的CISPR 32（多媒体设备发射）和CISPR 35（多媒体设备抗扰度）等效标准，以及适用的IEC 61000系列EMC标准。EMC合规证据通常须作为CRC型式认证技术文件的一部分提交。ICONTEC为国家标准机构；SIC负责市场监督执法。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞遵循ICONTEC（哥倫比亞標準與認證研究所）NTC標準，該標準採用IEC和CISPR國際標準作為電磁相容性依據。無線及物聯網裝置須符合NTC採用的CISPR 32（多媒體設備發射）和CISPR 35（多媒體設備抗擾度）等效標準，以及適用的IEC 61000系列EMC標準。EMC合規證據通常須作為CRC型式認證技術文件的一部分提交。ICONTEC為國家標準機構；SIC負責市場監督執法。

standards_or_laws: ICONTEC NTC equivalents of CISPR 32 — emissions limits for multimedia equipment (adopted from IEC/CISPR)
ICONTEC NTC equivalents of CISPR 35 — immunity requirements for multimedia equipment
IEC 61000 series — general EMC emission and immunity standards (adopted via ICONTEC NTC)
CRC homologación technical dossier requirements — EMC test reports as part of type-approval submission

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for wireless and information technology equipment is governed by GB 9254 (radiated and conducted emissions, aligned with CISPR 32) and GB 17625.1 (conducted disturbances, aligned with IEC 61000-3-2). Products in scope of CCC require EMC testing and certification by a CNCA-authorised lab. GB/T 9254 harmonises substantially with CISPR 32 but uses Chinese-specific administrative procedures and certification bodies. Test data generated under GB 9254 may be partially reusable for Colombian purposes if an ICONTEC-recognised or ILAC-accredited laboratory is involved, but this must be confirmed with the CRC submission authority.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线及信息技术设备的EMC合规由GB 9254（辐射和传导发射，与CISPR 32对齐）和GB 17625.1（传导干扰，与IEC 61000-3-2对齐）约束。属于CCC范围的产品须由CNCA认可实验室进行EMC检测和认证。GB/T 9254与CISPR 32大体协调，但采用中国特定行政程序和认证机构。若涉及ICONTEC认可或ILAC认可的实验室，依据GB 9254生成的检测数据可能部分可用于哥伦比亚申请，但须向CRC提交机构确认。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線及資訊技術設備的EMC合規由GB 9254（輻射和傳導發射，與CISPR 32對齊）和GB 17625.1（傳導干擾，與IEC 61000-3-2對齊）約束。屬於CCC範圍的產品須由CNCA認可實驗室進行EMC檢測和認證。GB/T 9254與CISPR 32大體協調，但採用中國特定行政程序和認證機構。若涉及ICONTEC認可或ILAC認可的實驗室，依據GB 9254生成的檢測數據可能部分可用於哥倫比亞申請，但須向CRC提交機構確認。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 / GB/T 9254 — China EMC standard for IT equipment emissions (aligned with CISPR 32)
GB 17625.1 — China conducted disturbances standard (aligned with IEC 61000-3-2)
CCC EMC testing — required by CNCA-authorised labs for products in CCC scope

gap.en: Chinese GB 9254 EMC test data generated by CNCA-authorised labs may not be directly accepted for CRC homologación. If the testing laboratory holds ILAC accreditation and the test parameters align with the applicable ICONTEC NTC / CISPR standard, partial data reuse may be possible — but this must be confirmed with the CRC submission body. Chinese CCC EMC certificates are not recognised in Colombia. Exporters should plan to perform or supplement EMC testing at an ILAC-accredited laboratory against the relevant NTC/CISPR limits and submit the data as part of the CRC technical dossier.
gap.zh: 由CNCA认可实验室生成的中国GB 9254 EMC检测数据，可能无法直接被CRC型式认证接受。若检测实验室持有ILAC认可资质且检测参数与适用ICONTEC NTC / CISPR标准一致，则部分数据复用或可行——但须向CRC提交机构确认。中国CCC EMC证书在哥伦比亚不被认可。出口商应计划在ILAC认可实验室按相关NTC/CISPR限值进行或补充EMC检测，并将数据作为CRC技术文件的一部分提交。
gap.zht: 由CNCA認可實驗室生成的中國GB 9254 EMC檢測數據，可能無法直接被CRC型式認證接受。若檢測實驗室持有ILAC認可資質且檢測參數與適用ICONTEC NTC / CISPR標準一致，則部分數據複用或可行——但須向CRC提交機構確認。中國CCC EMC證書在哥倫比亞不被認可。出口商應計劃在ILAC認可實驗室按相關NTC/CISPR限值進行或補充EMC檢測，並將數據作為CRC技術文件的一部分提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC compliance evidence (NTC/CISPR-based test reports) required as part of the CRC homologación technical dossier
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 9254 EMC testing required for CCC-scope products; GB/T 9254 test reports required for export declarations

source.publisher: ICONTEC — Instituto Colombiano de Normas Técnicas y Certificación

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia applies ICONTEC NTC standards (adopting IEC/CISPR) for EMC compliance. EMC test data from Chinese GB 9254 testing may be partially reusable if generated at an ILAC-accredited laboratory, but direct recognition is not guaranteed. Verify current ICONTEC NTC requirements and CRC test-report acceptance criteria with a qualified Colombian regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚采用ICONTEC NTC标准（采用IEC/CISPR）进行EMC合规。若在ILAC认可实验室生成，中国GB 9254检测数据可能部分可复用，但不保证直接认可。请向合格的哥伦比亚监管专业人士核验现行ICONTEC NTC要求和CRC检测报告认可标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞採用ICONTEC NTC標準（採用IEC/CISPR）進行EMC合規。若在ILAC認可實驗室生成，中國GB 9254檢測數據可能部分可複用，但不保證直接認可。請向合格的哥倫比亞監管專業人士核驗現行ICONTEC NTC要求和CRC檢測報告認可標準。

requirement_topic.en: Spanish Labelling — CRC Homologation Number and Mandatory Product Information
requirement_topic.zh: 西班牙语标注——CRC认证编号及强制性产品信息
requirement_topic.zht: 西班牙語標注——CRC認證編號及強制性產品資訊

summary.en: All devices sold in Colombia must carry Spanish-language labels. The CRC homologation certificate number must appear on the product label or packaging. Labels must identify the product model, manufacturer or importer, country of origin, and CRC approval number. The SIC (Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio) enforces consumer-protection labelling rules and can order withdrawal of non-compliant products. Labels exclusively in Chinese, English, or other non-Spanish languages do not satisfy Colombian requirements. Where a device bears an FCC ID or CE mark, these do not substitute for or imply CRC compliance — the CRC number must also be present.
summary.zh: 在哥伦比亚销售的所有设备须贴附西班牙语标签。CRC型式认证证书编号须标注于产品标签或包装上。标签须标明产品型号、制造商或进口商、原产国及CRC核准编号。工业商业监督局（SIC）负责执行消费者保护标注规则，可命令不合规产品下架。仅使用中文、英文或其他非西班牙语标签不满足哥伦比亚要求。若设备标有FCC ID或CE标志，这些标志不能替代或暗示CRC合规——CRC编号亦须同时标注。
summary.zht: 在哥倫比亞銷售的所有設備須貼附西班牙語標籤。CRC型式認證證書編號須標注於產品標籤或包裝上。標籤須標明產品型號、製造商或進口商、原產國及CRC核准編號。工業商業監督局（SIC）負責執行消費者保護標注規則，可命令不合規產品下架。僅使用中文、英文或其他非西班牙語標籤不滿足哥倫比亞要求。若裝置標有FCC ID或CE標誌，這些標誌不能替代或暗示CRC合規——CRC編號亦須同時標注。

standards_or_laws: CRC homologación regulations — mandatory display of CRC certificate number on label
SIC consumer-protection labelling rules — Spanish-language mandatory product information for Colombia
Decreto 3466 de 1982 (Estatuto del Consumidor, superseded by Ley 1480 de 2011) — Colombian consumer-protection labelling framework
Ley 1480 de 2011 (Estatuto del Consumidor) — current consumer-protection law requiring accurate Spanish-language labelling

summary.en: In China, consumer electronics and electrical products must display Simplified Chinese labelling including product model, manufacturer name and address, rated voltage, power, and relevant CCC certification mark and number where applicable. Chinese labelling standards are governed by GB 5296 series and mandatory CCC label requirements. These Chinese labelling requirements are entirely separate from Colombian labelling obligations — Spanish-language labels with the CRC number must be added for the Colombian market.
summary.zh: 在中国，消费电子和电气产品须贴附简体中文标签，包含产品型号、制造商名称和地址、额定电压、功率，以及适用时的CCC认证标志和编号。中国标注标准由GB 5296系列和强制性CCC标签要求规范。上述中国标注要求与哥伦比亚标注义务完全独立——须为哥伦比亚市场增加含CRC编号的西班牙语标签。
summary.zht: 在中國，消費電子和電氣產品須貼附簡體中文標籤，包含產品型號、製造商名稱和地址、額定電壓、功率，以及適用時的CCC認證標誌和編號。中國標注標準由GB 5296系列和強制性CCC標籤要求規範。上述中國標注要求與哥倫比亞標注義務完全獨立——須為哥倫比亞市場增加含CRC編號的西班牙語標籤。

standards_or_laws: GB 5296 series — Chinese consumer product labelling standards
CCC label requirements — mandatory CCC mark and certificate number display for in-scope products sold in China

gap.en: Chinese-language or English-language-only labels do not satisfy Colombian requirements. For the Colombian market, a Spanish-language label must be prepared that includes the CRC homologation number, manufacturer or importer identity, product model, and country of origin. Labels can be applied as a sticker overlay for market entry. The CRC number cannot be added until the homologation certificate is issued — labelling must therefore be planned as a post-certification step.
gap.zh: 仅使用中文或英文标签不满足哥伦比亚要求。针对哥伦比亚市场，须制作包含CRC认证编号、制造商或进口商信息、产品型号及原产国的西班牙语标签。入市时可采用贴纸叠加方式加贴标签。CRC编号须在取得认证证书后方可添加——因此标注须作为认证后步骤进行规划。
gap.zht: 僅使用中文或英文標籤不滿足哥倫比亞要求。針對哥倫比亞市場，須製作包含CRC認證編號、製造商或進口商資訊、產品型號及原產國的西班牙語標籤。入市時可採用貼紙疊加方式加貼標籤。CRC編號須在取得認證證書後方可添加——因此標注須作為認證後步驟進行規劃。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Spanish-language labelling with CRC homologation number required for all devices sold in Colombia; enforced by SIC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — Simplified Chinese labelling and CCC mark required for in-scope products sold in China under GB 5296 and CCC rules

source.publisher: SIC — Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio (Colombia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia requires Spanish-language labels with the CRC homologation number on all wireless and telecom terminal equipment. Chinese-only or English-only labels do not comply. The CRC number must be obtained before the label can be finalised. Verify current SIC labelling enforcement scope and CRC label-format requirements with a qualified Colombian regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚要求所有无线及电信终端设备贴附含CRC认证编号的西班牙语标签。仅使用中文或英文标签不合规。CRC编号须在定稿标签前取得。请向合格的哥伦比亚监管专业人士核验现行SIC标注执法范围和CRC标签格式要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞要求所有無線及電信終端設備貼附含CRC認證編號的西班牙語標籤。僅使用中文或英文標籤不合規。CRC編號須在定稿標籤前取得。請向合格的哥倫比亞監管專業人士核驗現行SIC標注執法範圍和CRC標籤格式要求。
